purpose: Define response families so future training/eval can detect family collapse before runtime.

followup.description: Clarify, continue, explain the previous idea, or answer why/how.

open_social.description: Light conversation and social opening, not task planning.

planning.description: Organize time, tasks, priorities, or a practical start.

support.description: Calming, reassurance, pressure relief, and emotional support.

topic.description: Discuss a concept or give a simple example.
